steps.title: Identify the structures on each side of the blank
steps.content: Before the blank: the noun “scribbles.” After the blank: a clause beginning with “that” that describes what the scribbles are like.

steps.title: Apply the rule for 'that' clauses
steps.content: Choice B is correct because a clause introduced by “that” attaches directly to the noun it modifies without punctuation. The other choices violate this rule by inserting punctuation that breaks the noun-clause connection. That matches choice B — B is correct.
